spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the letter-spacing no-op intervention correctly across Latin (does space) and Arabic / Devanagari (remains joined) script systems.

interactive.rationale: Provides a letter-spacing slider that dynamically applies style to the container and displays computed results.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly implements and aligns with the description of disabling letter-spacing tracking for joined scripts.

edge_cases.rationale: Shows Latin, Arabic, and Devanagari, but does not cover other cursive scripts like Syriac, Phags-pa, or Mongolian where letter-spacing is also ignored.

design_system.rationale: Perfect compliance with shared styles, responsive margins, and standard system fonts.

openQuestions.title: Verify web font fallback joining behaviors
openQuestions.detail: Different system fonts handles cursive joining in different ways. The cursive class specifies several fallback cursive fonts; adding a font-family selector could help test if the letter-spacing intervention remains robust across various font fallback chains.

summary: A straightforward, highly illustrative concept demonstrating how the letter-spacing no-op intervention preserves cursive scripts' join structures while working perfectly on Latin scripts.
